calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Modify Trust Based On Consent Of The Settlors And Benficiaries
Off Calendar Nov-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katherine Fowler, via ZOOM, for Douglas Abbey and Nancey Abbey.

The court queries counsel whether the consent to this petition will harm the minor if granted. Counsel advises that she does not believe so. The court advises counsel that it will be expecting a new ex parte petition regarding fees and release of the Guardian Ad Litem. Counsel points to the waivers of notice filed with the consents and asks the court whether notice should be given regarding the new ex parte application. The court advises counsel that the safest course for her would be to notify the parties.

The Petition for Order to Modify Trust, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Modify Trust Based On Consent Of The Settlors And Benficiaries
Off Calendar Aug-25-2021 Continued To Oct-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
